news.t: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'
AllianceBernstein Launches Three New Active Equity ETFs on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: HIDV is an equity ETF with a total of 109 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.90%, Apple at 7.52%, Microsoft at 3.94%, Broadcom at 3.66%, and Alphabet at 3.51%.

overview.description: The AB US High Dividend ETF (HIDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of high dividend-paying companies. Selection is based on a proprietary systemic approach of large- and mid-cap US stocks. HIDV was launched on Mar 22, 2023 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'
data.text: This week's ETF Wrap takes you inside the rally in dividend-paying equity ETFs as investors seek to position for President-elect Donald Trump's second term in the White House.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Launches Three New Active Equity ETFs on NYSE Arca
